mbuf_packet_buffer.definition_en: BSD-style network packet buffers using chained mbufs to carry data and efficiently prepend/strip headers across protocol layers.
confusions: mbuf_packet_buffer 是 BSD 风格；skb_packet_buffer 是 Linux 风格。

skb_packet_buffer.definition_zh: Linux 风格的网络报文缓冲，用 head/data/tail/end 指针管理头部空间和负载。
skb_packet_buffer.definition_en: Linux-style network packet buffer using head/data/tail/end pointers to manage headroom and payload across layers.
confusions: skb_packet_buffer 是 Linux 风格；mbuf_packet_buffer 是 BSD 风格。

packet_filter_hook.definition_zh: 在协议栈关键点插入钩子，对经过的报文做过滤、修改或转发决策（如 netfilter）。
packet_filter_hook.definition_en: Inserts hooks at key protocol-stack points to filter, modify, or route passing packets (e.g. netfilter).
confusions: packet_filter_hook 是栈内钩子过滤；port_demux 仅按端口分发。

unix_domain_socket.definition_zh: 同主机进程间通过文件系统路径或抽象名建立的本地套接字，走 socket API 但不经网络。
unix_domain_socket.definition_en: A local socket between same-host processes via a filesystem path or abstract name, using the socket API without networking.
confusions: unix_domain_socket 本机 IPC；TCP/UDP socket 跨网络。
unix_domain_socket.c_example: int s = socket(AF_UNIX, SOCK_STREAM, 0); connect(s, (struct sockaddr*)&un, len);

loopback_device.definition_zh: 虚拟网络接口把发往本机地址(127.0.0.1)的报文直接回送给本机协议栈。
loopback_device.definition_en: A virtual network interface that loops packets destined for the local address (127.0.0.1) straight back into the local stack.
confusions: loopback_device 是虚拟网络接口；unix_domain_socket 不经 IP 栈。

ticket_spinlock.definition_zh: 用递增票号保证 FIFO 公平获取：取号者等到 now_serving 等于自己的票号再进入临界区。
ticket_spinlock.definition_en: A spinlock using incrementing ticket numbers for FIFO fairness: a thread waits until now_serving equals its ticket before entering.
confusions: ticket_spinlock 保证 FIFO；test_and_set_spinlock(已存在) 不保证顺序。
ticket_spinlock.rust_example: let t = self.next.fetch_add(1, AcqRel); while self.serving.load(Acquire) != t {}

lock_owner_debug.definition_zh: 记录持锁的 CPU/线程，检测重复获取或在错误上下文释放等错误。
lock_owner_debug.definition_en: Records the owning CPU/thread of a lock to detect double-acquire or release in the wrong context.
confusions: lock_owner_debug 用于调试检查；lock_order_check 检查加锁顺序。

lock_order_check.definition_zh: 验证锁按固定全局顺序获取，检测可能导致死锁的逆序加锁。
lock_order_check.definition_en: Verifies that locks are acquired in a fixed global order to detect reverse-order acquisition that could deadlock.
confusions: lock_order_check 防死锁顺序；lock_owner_debug 检查重复持有。

blocking_mutex.definition_zh: 获取不到锁时让出 CPU 进入睡眠，被释放唤醒，适合可能长时间持有的临界区。
blocking_mutex.definition_en: When the lock is unavailable, the caller yields and sleeps, woken on release; suited to potentially long critical sections.
confusions: blocking_mutex 睡眠等待；ticket_spinlock 忙等。

sleeplock_mutex.definition_zh: xv6 风格睡眠锁：用自旋锁保护内部状态，争用时睡眠，适合磁盘等慢操作临界区。
sleeplock_mutex.definition_en: An xv6-style sleeplock: a spinlock guards its internal state and contenders sleep, suited to slow critical sections like disk I/O.
confusions: sleeplock_mutex 与 sleep_lock 同源；blocking_mutex 是更通用阻塞锁概念。
sleeplock_mutex.c_example: void acquiresleep(struct sleeplock *lk){ acquire(&lk->lk); while(lk->locked) sleep(lk, &lk->lk); lk->locked = 1; release(&lk->lk); }
sleeplock_mutex.rust_example: pub fn lock(&self){ while self.locked.swap(true) { schedule(); } }

counting_semaphore.definition_zh: 维护一个计数，P/wait 减一（不足则阻塞），V/signal 加一并唤醒等待者。
counting_semaphore.definition_en: Maintains a count; P/wait decrements (blocking if zero) and V/signal increments and wakes a waiter.
exclude: 二值互斥锁的所有权语义
confusions: counting_semaphore 计资源数；blocking_mutex 表二值互斥与所有权。
counting_semaphore.rust_example: pub fn down(&self){ while self.count.load() == 0 { block(); } self.count.fetch_sub(1); }

sleep_lock.definition_zh: 持锁期间允许睡眠的锁，争用者被挂起而非忙等，常保护磁盘/文件等长操作。
sleep_lock.definition_en: A lock that permits sleeping while held; contenders are suspended rather than busy-waiting, protecting long operations like disk/file I/O.
confusions: sleep_lock 持锁可睡；spinlock 持锁不可睡。
sleep_lock.c_example: acquiresleep(&ip->lock); /* may sleep on disk I/O */

blocking_lock.definition_zh: 获取失败时阻塞调用者（睡眠）而非忙等，是睡眠锁/互斥锁的统称。
blocking_lock.definition_en: A lock that blocks (sleeps) the caller on failure instead of busy-waiting; a general term for sleeplocks/mutexes.
confusions: blocking_lock 阻塞等待；自旋锁忙等。

wait_queue.definition_zh: 维护一组在某条件上阻塞的任务，条件满足时唤醒其中一个或全部。
wait_queue.definition_en: Holds a set of tasks blocked on a condition, waking one or all when the condition is satisfied.
confusions: wait_queue 是阻塞任务集合；sleep_wakeup_channel(已存在) 用地址做通道。

condition_variable.definition_zh: 配合互斥锁使用，wait 原子释放锁并睡眠，signal/broadcast 唤醒等待者重新检查条件。
condition_variable.definition_en: Used with a mutex: wait atomically releases the lock and sleeps; signal/broadcast wakes waiters to recheck the condition.
confusions: condition_variable 与互斥锁配合并重检谓词；wait_queue 是更底层结构。

read_copy_update.definition_zh: 读者无锁访问，更新者复制副本修改后原子替换指针，旧版本在宽限期后回收。
read_copy_update.definition_en: Readers access lock-free while updaters copy-modify-replace a pointer atomically; old versions are reclaimed after a grace period.
confusions: RCU 读者不阻塞，更新延迟回收；read_write_lock 读者仍需获锁。

atomic_refcount.definition_zh: 用原子加减维护对象引用数，归零时安全释放，无需额外锁。
atomic_refcount.definition_en: Maintains an object's reference count with atomic increment/decrement, freeing safely at zero without a separate lock.
confusions: atomic_refcount 用原子操作；lock_protected_refcount 用锁保护普通计数。

lock_protected_refcount.definition_zh: 用自旋锁/互斥锁保护普通整型引用计数的增减与归零判断。
lock_protected_refcount.definition_en: Uses a spinlock/mutex to protect increment/decrement and zero-check of a plain integer reference count.
confusions: lock_protected_refcount 加锁；atomic_refcount 用原子指令。
lock_protected_refcount.rust_example: let mut g = self.lock.lock(); g.ref -= 1; if g.ref == 0 { free(); }

read_write_lock.definition_zh: 允许多个读者并发持有，但写者独占，读写互斥以保护共享数据。
read_write_lock.definition_en: Allows multiple concurrent readers but exclusive writers, with read/write mutually exclusive to protect shared data.
confusions: read_write_lock 读者仍获共享锁；RCU 读者完全无锁。
read_write_lock.rust_example: let r = rwlock.read(); // shared; let w = rwlock.write(); // exclusive

minimal_libc.definition_zh: 用户态最小 C 库，提供 printf、malloc、字符串等基础函数和系统调用封装。
minimal_libc.definition_en: A minimal user-space C library providing basics like printf, malloc, string functions, and syscall wrappers.
confusions: minimal_libc 是用户库；syscall_wrapper 是其中的系统调用封装部分。

syscall_wrapper.definition_zh: 用户态函数把参数装入寄存器并执行 ecall/syscall，再返回内核结果。
syscall_wrapper.definition_en: A user-space function that loads arguments into registers, executes ecall/syscall, and returns the kernel's result.
confusions: syscall_wrapper 与 user_syscall_stubs(已存在) 同源，强调单个封装函数。
syscall_wrapper.c_example: int write(int fd, void *buf, int n){ return syscall3(SYS_write, fd, buf, n); }
syscall_wrapper.rust_example: pub fn write(fd: usize, buf: &[u8]) -> isize { syscall(SYSCALL_WRITE, [fd, buf.as_ptr() as usize, buf.len()]) }

user_shell.definition_zh: 用户态命令解释器，读取输入、解析命令、fork/exec 运行程序并处理重定向与管道。
user_shell.definition_en: A user-space command interpreter that reads input, parses commands, forks/execs programs, and handles redirection and pipes.
confusions: user_shell 是交互解释器；command_parser 是其解析子模块。
user_shell.rust_example: loop { let line = read_line(); let pid = fork(); if pid == 0 { exec(&line); } }

xv6_shell.definition_zh: xv6 的简易 shell，支持执行、重定向(<,>)、管道(|) 和后台、分组等基本结构。
xv6_shell.definition_en: The xv6 simple shell supporting exec, redirection (<,>), pipes (|), background, and grouping constructs.
exclude: 复杂 bash 脚本特性
confusions: xv6_shell 是具体实现；user_shell 是通用 shell 概念。

command_parser.definition_zh: 把 shell 输入字符串切分为命令、参数和操作符（管道、重定向），构造执行树。
command_parser.definition_en: Splits a shell input string into commands, arguments, and operators (pipes, redirects), building an execution tree.
confusions: command_parser 只解析；user_shell 还负责执行。
command_parser.c_example: struct cmd* parsecmd(char *s){ cmd = parseline(&s, es); return cmd; }

initcode_first_process.definition_zh: 内核手工构造的第一个用户进程，仅含一小段汇编/二进制，负责 exec 真正的 init 程序。
initcode_first_process.definition_en: The kernel's hand-crafted first user process, a tiny assembly/binary blob that execs the real init program.
confusions: initcode_first_process 是内嵌引导用户码；user_init_program 是其后 exec 的真正 init。

user_init_program.definition_zh: 用户态第一个真正程序，负责打开控制台、启动 shell 并回收孤儿进程。
user_init_program.definition_en: The first real user program, responsible for opening the console, launching the shell, and reaping orphaned processes.
confusions: user_init_program 是真正 init；initcode_first_process 是引导它的内嵌码。
user_init_program.c_example: if(fork() == 0) exec("sh", argv); for(;;) wait(0); // reap
user_init_program.rust_example: fn main(){ if fork()==0 { exec("user_shell"); } loop { let _ = wait(); } }

user_test_programs.definition_zh: 随系统打包的用户态测试程序集合，验证系统调用、文件系统、内存等功能。
user_test_programs.definition_en: A set of bundled user-space test programs that exercise syscalls, filesystem, memory, and other functionality.
confusions: user_test_programs 是测试集合；usertests 是 xv6 中的具体程序。
user_test_programs.c_example: // user/_forktest, user/_grind etc. run as user processes

usertests.definition_zh: xv6 的综合用户态测试程序，覆盖 fork、文件、管道、内存、越界等大量边界场景。
usertests.definition_en: The xv6 comprehensive user-space test program covering fork, files, pipes, memory, out-of-bounds, and many edge cases.
confusions: usertests 是 xv6 具体套件；user_test_programs 是泛指。
usertests.c_example: // user/usertests.c runs dozens of named tests

filesystem_tests.definition_zh: 专门验证文件创建、读写、目录、链接、大文件和崩溃恢复的用户态测试。
filesystem_tests.definition_en: User-space tests specifically validating file create, read/write, directories, links, large files, and crash recovery.
confusions: filesystem_tests 针对 FS；mmap_tests 针对内存映射。
filesystem_tests.c_example: fd = open("big", O_CREATE|O_WRONLY); for(i=0;i<N;i++) write(fd, buf, 512);
filesystem_tests.rust_example: let fd = open("big", O_CREATE|O_WRONLY); for _ in 0..N { write(fd, &buf); }

mmap_tests.definition_zh: 验证 mmap/munmap 的匿名与文件映射、权限、写回、fork 共享等行为的用户态测试。
mmap_tests.definition_en: User-space tests validating mmap/munmap behavior for anonymous and file mappings, permissions, writeback, and fork sharing.
confusions: mmap_tests 针对内存映射；filesystem_tests 针对文件操作。
mmap_tests.c_example: char *p = mmap(0, len, PROT_READ, MAP_PRIVATE, fd, 0); assert(p[0] == expected);
mmap_tests.rust_example: let p = mmap(0, len, PROT_READ, MAP_PRIVATE, fd, 0); assert_eq!(p[0], expected);

elf_binary_abi.definition_zh: 用户程序遵循 ELF 文件格式和调用约定（入口、段、栈初始布局、寄存器约定）与内核协作。
elf_binary_abi.definition_en: User programs follow the ELF format and calling convention (entry, segments, initial stack layout, register usage) to interoperate with the kernel.
confusions: elf_binary_abi 是格式与约定；elf_exec_loader(已存在) 是装载它的内核代码。
elf_binary_abi.c_example: struct elfhdr { uint magic; ... uint64 entry; ushort phnum; };
elf_binary_abi.rust_example: let elf = ElfFile::new(data)?; let entry = elf.header.pt2.entry_point();

posix_compat_layer.definition_zh: 提供与 POSIX 语义兼容的系统调用和接口，使标准应用/libc 能在该内核上运行。
posix_compat_layer.definition_en: Provides POSIX-compatible syscalls and interfaces so standard applications/libc can run on the kernel.
confusions: posix_compat_layer 追求标准兼容；minimal_libc 只是最小用户库。
posix_compat_layer.rust_example: // syscall numbers match Linux for musl compatibility

dynamic_linker_abi.definition_zh: 支持动态链接：内核/加载器装载 ld.so，解析共享库依赖与重定位、通过 auxv 传递信息。
dynamic_linker_abi.definition_en: Supports dynamic linking: the kernel/loader loads ld.so, which resolves shared-library dependencies and relocations, with info passed via auxv.
confusions: dynamic_linker_abi 处理共享库；elf_binary_abi 是基础静态格式。
dynamic_linker_abi.c_example: // kernel loads interpreter from PT_INTERP, passes auxv
dynamic_linker_abi.rust_example: // set up AT_PHDR, AT_ENTRY, AT_BASE in aux vector

vdso_page.definition_zh: 内核映射到用户空间的只读代码/数据页，让 gettimeofday 等调用无需陷入内核即可执行。
vdso_page.definition_en: A read-only code/data page the kernel maps into user space so calls like gettimeofday run without trapping into the kernel.
confusions: vdso_page 在用户态执行避免陷入；普通 syscall 需 ecall 进内核。
vdso_page.c_example: // __vdso_gettimeofday reads shared kernel time page, no syscall
vdso_page.rust_example: // map VDSO page read+exec into user address space

deferred_work_queue.definition_zh: 把中断上下文不便完成的工作排入队列，稍后在内核线程的进程上下文中执行。
deferred_work_queue.definition_en: Queues work that is inconvenient in interrupt context to be executed later in a kernel thread's process context.
confusions: deferred_work_queue 在进程上下文执行可睡眠；bottom_half_softirq 在软中断上下文不可睡。

tasklet_like_deferred_work.definition_zh: 轻量延迟机制，在软中断上下文串行执行短小、不可睡眠的延后任务。
tasklet_like_deferred_work.definition_en: A lightweight deferred mechanism running short, non-sleepable follow-up tasks serially in softirq context.
confusions: tasklet_like 在软中断不可睡；deferred_work_queue 在进程上下文可睡。

bottom_half_softirq.definition_zh: 把中断处理拆成快速上半部和延后下半部，下半部在软中断上下文批量处理。
bottom_half_softirq.definition_en: Splits interrupt handling into a fast top half and a deferred bottom half processed in softirq context.
exclude: 直接在硬中断完成全部工作
confusions: bottom_half_softirq 是软中断下半部；deferred_work_queue 在进程上下文。

timer_list.definition_zh: 用链表保存待到期的内核定时器，按到期时间检查并触发回调。
timer_list.definition_en: Holds pending kernel timers in a list, checked against expiry time to fire callbacks.
confusions: timer_list 简单链表；timer_wheel 用分层桶降低复杂度。
timer_list.c_example: struct timer_list { unsigned long expires; void (*function)(void); };
timer_list.rust_example: struct Timer { expires: u64, callback: Box<dyn Fn()> }

timer_wheel.definition_zh: 按到期时间分桶（多级轮）组织大量定时器，使插入和到期处理接近常数时间。
timer_wheel.definition_en: Organizes many timers into time-bucketed (multi-level) wheels so insertion and expiry processing are near constant time.
confusions: timer_wheel 用分桶降复杂度；timer_list 是线性链表。

hrtimer.definition_zh: 基于纳秒级时基和红黑树管理的高精度定时器，支持远超 tick 粒度的精确到期。
hrtimer.definition_en: A high-resolution timer based on a nanosecond time base and a red-black tree, supporting precise expiry far finer than the tick.
confusions: hrtimer 高精度红黑树管理；timer_wheel/timer_list 是 tick 粒度。
hrtimer.c_example: hrtimer_init(&t, CLOCK_MONOTONIC, HRTIMER_MODE_REL); hrtimer_start(&t, ns, mode);

loadable_kernel_module.definition_zh: 运行时把代码加载进内核、解析符号与重定位并注册功能，可卸载，支持热扩展。
loadable_kernel_module.definition_en: Loads code into the kernel at runtime, resolving symbols and relocations and registering functionality, with unload support for hot extension.
confusions: loadable_kernel_module 运行期加载；static_kernel_only 全部静态编入。
loadable_kernel_module.rust_example: // rare in Rust kernels; static linking is the norm

static_kernel_only.definition_zh: 所有驱动和功能在编译期静态链接进内核镜像，不支持运行时加载模块。
static_kernel_only.definition_en: All drivers and features are statically linked into the kernel image at build time, with no runtime module loading.
confusions: static_kernel_only 全静态；loadable_kernel_module 支持动态加载。
static_kernel_only.c_example: // all drivers compiled in; no module loader exists
static_kernel_only.rust_example: // everything linked into single kernel binary

entropy_pool.definition_zh: 收集中断时序、设备噪声等不可预测事件混入熵池，为随机数生成提供种子。
entropy_pool.definition_en: Collects unpredictable events (interrupt timing, device noise) into an entropy pool to seed random number generation.
exclude: 确定性 PRNG 无熵源
confusions: entropy_pool 收集真实熵；simple_prng 是确定性伪随机。

simple_prng.definition_zh: 用确定性算法（如 LCG、xorshift）由种子生成伪随机序列，非密码学安全。
simple_prng.definition_en: Generates a pseudorandom sequence from a seed using a deterministic algorithm (e.g. LCG, xorshift); not cryptographically secure.
confusions: simple_prng 确定性可预测；entropy_pool 提供真随机种子。

reboot_poweroff.definition_zh: 内核通过平台机制（SBI/ACPI/MMIO 复位寄存器）触发系统重启或断电关机。
reboot_poweroff.definition_en: The kernel triggers system reboot or power-off via platform mechanisms (SBI/ACPI/MMIO reset registers).
confusions: reboot_poweroff 终止整机；suspend_resume 是低功耗暂停可恢复。

suspend_resume.definition_zh: 保存设备和 CPU 状态进入低功耗睡眠，唤醒时恢复状态继续运行。
suspend_resume.definition_en: Saves device and CPU state to enter low-power sleep, restoring state on wake to continue execution.
confusions: suspend_resume 可恢复运行；reboot_poweroff 不保留状态。

sbi_shutdown.definition_zh: S 态内核通过 SBI system_reset/shutdown 调用请求机器态固件关闭系统。
sbi_shutdown.definition_en: The S-mode kernel requests system shutdown via the SBI system_reset/shutdown call to the machine-mode firmware.
confusions: sbi_shutdown 经 SBI 固件；reboot_poweroff 是更通用的关机重启概念。

kernel_command_line.definition_zh: 引导时传入的参数字符串，内核解析以配置根设备、控制台、调试选项等运行期行为。
kernel_command_line.definition_en: A parameter string passed at boot that the kernel parses to configure root device, console, debug options, and other runtime behavior.
confusions: kernel_command_line 是运行期参数；cargo_features 是编译期开关。

riscv_user_supervisor_split.definition_zh: RISC-V 用 U 模式运行用户程序、S 模式运行内核，通过 ecall/trap 在两级间切换。
riscv_user_supervisor_split.definition_en: RISC-V runs user programs in U-mode and the kernel in S-mode, switching between levels via ecall/trap.
confusions: riscv_user_supervisor_split 是 RISC-V 分级；x86_ring3_ring0_split 是 x86 的。

x86_ring3_ring0_split.definition_zh: x86 用 ring0 运行内核、ring3 运行用户，通过 syscall/int 和 iret 在特权级间切换。
x86_ring3_ring0_split.definition_en: x86 runs the kernel in ring0 and user code in ring3, switching via syscall/int and iret.
confusions: x86_ring3_ring0_split 是 x86 分级；riscv_user_supervisor_split 是 RISC-V 的。
x86_ring3_ring0_split.c_example: // segment selector RPL=3 for user code
x86_ring3_ring0_split.rust_example: // SYSRET to ring3 with user CS/SS

user_kernel_address_check.definition_zh: 系统调用中校验用户传入的指针落在合法用户地址范围内，拒绝指向内核区的地址。
user_kernel_address_check.definition_en: Syscalls validate that user-supplied pointers fall within the legal user address range, rejecting addresses pointing into kernel space.
confusions: user_kernel_address_check 校验地址范围；copy_user_validation(已存在) 强调拷贝前完整校验。
user_kernel_address_check.c_example: if(addr >= p->sz || addr + sizeof(uint64) > p->sz) return -1;
user_kernel_address_check.rust_example: if va >= USER_MAX || va + len > USER_MAX { return Err(EFAULT); }

pte_user_bit.definition_zh: 页表项的 U 位标记该页是否允许用户态访问，内核据此隔离用户与内核内存。
pte_user_bit.definition_en: The U bit in a page-table entry marks whether the page is user-accessible, enforcing user/kernel memory isolation.
confusions: pte_user_bit 控制用户可访问性；pte_flag_protection 是读写执行整体权限。
pte_user_bit.c_example: mappages(pagetable, va, sz, pa, PTE_R | PTE_W | PTE_U);

unix_uid_gid.definition_zh: 用用户 ID 和组 ID 标识进程身份，并对文件权限位(rwx)做访问控制。
unix_uid_gid.definition_en: Identifies process identity by user ID and group ID and enforces access control via file permission bits (rwx).
confusions: unix_uid_gid 是传统三类权限；acl 提供更细粒度条目；capability_model 拆分 root 权限。

capability_model.definition_zh: 把全权 root 拆分为细粒度能力（如 CAP_NET_ADMIN），按需授予进程降低权限风险。
capability_model.definition_en: Splits all-powerful root into fine-grained capabilities (e.g. CAP_NET_ADMIN) granted to processes as needed to reduce privilege risk.
confusions: capability_model 拆分 root 权限；unix_uid_gid 是粗粒度用户身份。

acl.definition_zh: 为对象附加细粒度的(主体, 权限)条目列表，超越传统属主/组/其他三类权限。
acl.definition_en: Attaches a fine-grained list of (principal, permission) entries to an object, going beyond traditional owner/group/other permissions.
confusions: acl 给多主体细粒度权限；unix_uid_gid 仅三类。

seccomp_filter.definition_zh: 用过滤规则(BPF)限制进程可执行的系统调用集合，违规则杀进程或返回错误，缩小攻击面。
seccomp_filter.definition_en: Uses filter rules (BPF) to restrict the set of syscalls a process may make, killing or erroring on violations to shrink the attack surface.
confusions: seccomp_filter 限制系统调用；namespace 隔离资源视图。

kernel_address_randomization.definition_zh: 启动时随机化内核镜像的加载基址，增加攻击者预测内核地址的难度。
kernel_address_randomization.definition_en: Randomizes the kernel image load base at boot to make it harder for attackers to predict kernel addresses.
confusions: KASLR 随机化内核基址；用户态 ASLR 随机化用户映射。
kernel_address_randomization.rust_example: let slide = rng.next() & KASLR_MASK; relocate_kernel(base + slide);

write_xor_execute_policy.definition_zh: 保证内存页不同时可写又可执行，阻止注入代码后直接执行的攻击。
write_xor_execute_policy.definition_en: Ensures no memory page is simultaneously writable and executable, preventing execution of injected code.
confusions: write_xor_execute_policy 限制 W 与 X 共存；pte_execute_disable 是其依赖的 NX 位。

pte_execute_disable.definition_zh: 页表项的 NX/不可执行位标记该页禁止取指执行，常用于数据/栈页防代码注入。
pte_execute_disable.definition_en: The NX/no-execute bit in a PTE marks a page as non-executable, commonly applied to data/stack pages to prevent code injection.
confusions: pte_execute_disable 是单个 NX 位；write_xor_execute_policy 是依赖它的整体策略。
pte_execute_disable.c_example: mappages(pt, stack_va, sz, pa, PTE_R | PTE_W); // no PTE_X

stack_canary.definition_zh: 在栈帧返回地址前放置已知哨兵值，函数返回前校验其是否被覆盖以检测栈溢出。
stack_canary.definition_en: Places a known sentinel value before a frame's return address and checks it before return to detect stack buffer overflows.
confusions: stack_canary 检测栈溢出覆盖；W^X 防止执行注入代码。

signed_module_check.definition_zh: 加载内核模块前验证其数字签名，拒绝未签名或签名无效的模块以保证完整性。
signed_module_check.definition_en: Verifies a kernel module's digital signature before loading, rejecting unsigned or invalidly signed modules to ensure integrity.
confusions: signed_module_check 验证模块来源；loadable_kernel_module 是加载机制本身。

log_buffer.definition_zh: 内核把日志写入内存环形缓冲(如 dmesg)，供后续读取，满则覆盖最旧记录。
log_buffer.definition_en: The kernel writes log messages into an in-memory ring buffer (like dmesg) for later retrieval, overwriting oldest entries when full.
confusions: log_buffer 在内存留存可回读；kernel_printf(已存在) 是输出接口。

qemu_debug_console.definition_zh: 利用 QEMU 提供的调试输出端口/设备把内核日志直接送到宿主终端。
qemu_debug_console.definition_en: Uses a QEMU-provided debug output port/device to send kernel logs straight to the host terminal.
confusions: qemu_debug_console 仅在仿真下可用；uart_mmio_driver 适用于真实硬件。
qemu_debug_console.c_example: // write to QEMU sifive_test or use semihosting for output
qemu_debug_console.rust_example: // debug output via QEMU semihosting SYS_WRITE0

kernel_panic.definition_zh: 遇到不可恢复错误时打印信息并停机，防止在损坏状态下继续运行。
kernel_panic.definition_en: On an unrecoverable error, prints a message and halts to prevent continuing in a corrupted state.
confusions: kernel_panic 整机停机；fault_kill_process 仅杀单个进程。

assert_bug_trap.definition_zh: 在违反不变量处触发断言或 BUG()，打印诊断并停机或陷入调试。
assert_bug_trap.definition_en: Triggers an assertion or BUG() where an invariant is violated, printing diagnostics and halting or trapping into debug.
confusions: assert_bug_trap 检测不变量违例；kernel_panic 是其常见后果。

frame_pointer_backtrace.definition_zh: 沿帧指针(fp/s0)链逐层回溯调用栈，打印各返回地址。
frame_pointer_backtrace.definition_en: Walks the call stack along the frame-pointer (fp/s0) chain, printing each saved return address.
confusions: frame_pointer_backtrace 靠 fp 链；dwarf_unwind_backtrace 用调试信息。
frame_pointer_backtrace.rust_example: let mut fp = current_fp(); while valid(fp) { print_ra(fp); fp = prev_fp(fp); }

dwarf_unwind_backtrace.definition_zh: 用 DWARF/.eh_frame 调试信息精确展开栈帧回溯，不依赖帧指针。
dwarf_unwind_backtrace.definition_en: Uses DWARF/.eh_frame debug information to precisely unwind stack frames without relying on frame pointers.
confusions: dwarf_unwind_backtrace 用调试信息；frame_pointer_backtrace 用 fp 链。
dwarf_unwind_backtrace.c_example: // parse .eh_frame CFI to compute caller frame
dwarf_unwind_backtrace.rust_example: // use gimli/.eh_frame to unwind without fp

syscall_trace.definition_zh: 记录进程发起的系统调用号、参数和返回值，用于调试和行为分析(如 strace)。
syscall_trace.definition_en: Records the syscall numbers, arguments, and return values a process issues, for debugging and behavior analysis (like strace).
confusions: syscall_trace 专注系统调用；event_trace 是更通用事件跟踪。
syscall_trace.c_example: if(p->trace_mask & (1 << num)) printf("%d: syscall %s -> %d\n", p->pid, names[num], ret);

event_trace.definition_zh: 在内核关键路径埋点记录事件(调度、中断、锁等)到跟踪缓冲，供事后分析。
event_trace.definition_en: Instruments key kernel paths to record events (scheduling, interrupts, locks) into a trace buffer for post-hoc analysis.
confusions: event_trace 记录多类内核事件；syscall_trace 仅系统调用。
event_trace.c_example: trace_sched_switch(prev, next); // record into trace buffer

ftrace_like_tracing.definition_zh: 通过函数入口插桩(mcount/__fentry__)记录函数调用流和耗时，类似 Linux ftrace。
ftrace_like_tracing.definition_en: Records function call flow and timing via function-entry instrumentation (mcount/__fentry__), like Linux ftrace.
confusions: ftrace_like_tracing 函数级插桩；event_trace 是预定义事件点。
ftrace_like_tracing.c_example: // compiler -pg inserts mcount() at each function entry
ftrace_like_tracing.rust_example: // instrument fn entry hooks for tracing

hardware_perf_counter.definition_zh: 读取 CPU 性能监控单元(PMU)计数器统计指令数、缓存命中、周期等微架构事件。
hardware_perf_counter.definition_en: Reads CPU performance monitoring unit (PMU) counters to measure instructions, cache hits, cycles, and other microarchitectural events.
confusions: hardware_perf_counter 读硬件 PMU；event_trace 是软件埋点。
hardware_perf_counter.c_example: uint64 c = read_csr(mcycle); // CPU cycle counter

gdb_remote_stub.definition_zh: 内核内置实现 GDB 远程串行协议(RSP)，让宿主 gdb 连接做断点、读写内存和寄存器。
gdb_remote_stub.definition_en: The kernel implements the GDB Remote Serial Protocol (RSP) so a host gdb can connect to set breakpoints and read/write memory and registers.
exclude: 宿主 gdb 程序本身
confusions: gdb_remote_stub 是内核内的桩；gdb_toolchain(已存在) 是宿主调试器。
gdb_remote_stub.c_example: // handle '$' RSP packets: read registers, set breakpoints

sanitizer_runtime.definition_zh: 编译器插桩配合运行时(KASAN/UBSAN 等)在运行中检测越界、未初始化或未定义行为。
sanitizer_runtime.definition_en: Compiler instrumentation plus a runtime (KASAN/UBSAN, etc.) detects out-of-bounds, uninitialized, or undefined behavior at runtime.
confusions: sanitizer_runtime 运行期插桩检测；stack_canary 仅查栈溢出。

riscv_h_extension.definition_zh: RISC-V H 扩展引入 HS/VS/VU 模式和两阶段地址翻译，支持运行客户操作系统。
riscv_h_extension.definition_en: The RISC-V H extension adds HS/VS/VU modes and two-stage address translation to run guest operating systems.
confusions: riscv_h_extension 是 RISC-V 虚拟化硬件；second_stage_page_table 是其中的 G-stage 翻译。
riscv_h_extension.c_example: // set hgatp for guest physical -> host physical (G-stage)

kvm_like_vcpu.definition_zh: 用 vCPU 结构保存客户寄存器与状态，宿主通过运行/退出循环执行并处理客户陷出。
kvm_like_vcpu.definition_en: A vCPU structure holds guest registers and state; the host runs an enter/exit loop to execute the guest and handle its traps.
confusions: kvm_like_vcpu 管理客户 CPU 状态；trap_and_emulate 处理其陷出指令。

second_stage_page_table.definition_zh: 虚拟化中把客户物理地址再翻译为宿主物理地址的页表(G-stage/EPT/NPT)。
second_stage_page_table.definition_en: In virtualization, a page table (G-stage/EPT/NPT) that translates guest-physical to host-physical addresses.
confusions: second_stage_page_table 是 GPA->HPA 翻译；普通 per_process_pagetable 是 VA->PA。
second_stage_page_table.c_example: // hgatp maps guest physical pages to host physical frames

trap_and_emulate.definition_zh: 客户执行特权或敏感指令时陷出到宿主，由宿主软件模拟其语义后恢复客户。
trap_and_emulate.definition_en: When the guest executes a privileged or sensitive instruction it traps to the host, which emulates its semantics in software and resumes the guest.
confusions: trap_and_emulate 在陷出后软件模拟；kvm_like_vcpu 是承载它的运行循环。
trap_and_emulate.rust_example: match exit { VmExit::Mmio(a) => emulate_mmio(a), VmExit::Csr => emulate_csr() }

virtio_guest_driver.definition_zh: 运行在客户机内的 VirtIO 前端驱动，通过 virtqueue 与宿主/设备后端交换 I/O。
virtio_guest_driver.definition_en: A VirtIO front-end driver inside the guest that exchanges I/O with the host/device back-end through virtqueues.
confusions: virtio_guest_driver 是客户前端；virtqueue_descriptor_ring(已存在) 是底层环结构。
virtio_guest_driver.rust_example: let mut vq = VirtQueue::new(header, 0); vq.add(tokens); header.notify(0);

virtio_mmio_transport.definition_zh: 客户机通过内存映射寄存器与 VirtIO 设备协商特性、配置队列并发出通知。
virtio_mmio_transport.definition_en: The guest negotiates features, configures queues, and issues notifications to a VirtIO device through memory-mapped registers.
confusions: virtio_mmio_transport 与 virtio_mmio(已存在) 同源；强调虚拟化客户机视角传输层。

paravirtual_clock.definition_zh: 客户机通过宿主提供的共享时间页获取准确时间，避免每次读时钟都陷出。
paravirtual_clock.definition_en: The guest reads accurate time from a host-provided shared time page, avoiding a trap on every clock read.
confusions: paravirtual_clock 共享宿主时基免陷出；sbi_timer 是设置下次中断。
paravirtual_clock.c_example: // read guest time from shared pvclock page (no vm-exit)

namespace_cgroup_container.definition_zh: 用命名空间隔离资源视图、用 cgroup 限制资源用量，组合成轻量级容器。
namespace_cgroup_container.definition_en: Combines namespaces for isolated resource views with cgroups for resource-usage limits to form lightweight containers.
confusions: namespace_cgroup_container 是容器组合；namespace 与 cgroup 是其两个组成部分。

chroot_isolation.definition_zh: 把进程的根目录改到子目录，使其只能看到该子树，是早期轻量文件系统隔离手段。
chroot_isolation.definition_en: Changes a process's root directory to a subdirectory so it only sees that subtree, an early lightweight filesystem isolation mechanism.
confusions: chroot_isolation 仅改根目录；mount_namespace 提供完整独立挂载视图。

user_mode_linux_like.title_zh: 类 UML 用户态内核
user_mode_linux_like.definition_zh: 把内核作为普通用户态进程运行(如 UML)，用宿主系统调用模拟硬件，便于调试与隔离。
user_mode_linux_like.definition_en: Runs the kernel as an ordinary user-space process (like UML), emulating hardware via host syscalls for easy debugging and isolation.
confusions: user_mode_linux_like 内核跑在用户态；kvm_like_vcpu 用硬件虚拟化执行客户。
user_mode_linux_like.c_example: // kernel runs as a host process; devices emulated via host fds
user_mode_linux_like.rust_example: // kernel compiled to run atop host OS (UML-style)

display_only_history.definition_zh: 用于前端展示项目演进/版本历史的元信息节点，不对应具体运行期内核机制。
display_only_history.definition_en: A metadata node for displaying the project's evolution/version history in the frontend; it maps to no concrete runtime kernel mechanism.
confusions: display_only_history 仅供展示；不应据此判断任何代码机制存在与否。
display_only_history.c_example: // not a code mechanism; documentation/history metadata only
display_only_history.rust_example: // not a code mechanism; documentation/history metadata only

mlfq_scheduler.definition_zh: 用多条不同优先级的就绪队列，按任务行为动态升降级：耗尽时间片的降级，交互/让出的保级或升级，兼顾响应性与吞吐。
mlfq_scheduler.definition_en: Several priority run-queues where a task is demoted when it uses its full quantum and kept/promoted when it yields early, balancing interactivity and throughput.
exclude: CFS 的 vruntime 红黑树
confusions: MLFQ 用离散优先级队列+反馈；CFS 用连续 vruntime 红黑树。
mlfq_scheduler.c_example:
if (p->used_full_slice) p->prio = min(p->prio+1, MAX_PRIO);
enqueue(&runq[p->prio], p);

cfs_rbtree_vruntime.title_zh: CFS 虚拟运行时红黑树
cfs_rbtree_vruntime.title_en: CFS red-black tree by virtual runtime
cfs_rbtree_vruntime.definition_zh: 完全公平调度器把可运行任务按虚拟运行时 vruntime 排进红黑树，每次取最左(vruntime 最小)节点运行，逼近理想公平分享。
cfs_rbtree_vruntime.definition_en: Linux CFS keeps runnable tasks in a red-black tree keyed by vruntime and always runs the leftmost (smallest-vruntime) task, approximating ideal fair sharing.
confusions: CFS 是无固定时间片的连续公平；MLFQ/O(1) 用离散优先级队列。
cfs_rbtree_vruntime.c_example:
se = rb_entry(leftmost, struct sched_entity, run_node);
curr->vruntime += calc_delta_fair(delta, curr);
cfs_rbtree_vruntime.rust_example:
let next = self.rbtree.iter().next();
se.vruntime += delta * NICE0_WEIGHT / se.weight;

eevdf_scheduler.title_zh: EEVDF 最早可用虚拟截止期调度
eevdf_scheduler.definition_zh: 按 lag 判定任务是否可用，并为每个任务算虚拟截止期，优先运行可用且虚拟截止期最早者；Linux 6.6 起替代 CFS 选择逻辑。
eevdf_scheduler.definition_en: Picks the eligible task (non-negative lag) with the earliest virtual deadline; replaced CFS's core picking logic in Linux 6.6.
confusions: EEVDF 在公平基础上加虚拟截止期与 eligibility，改善延迟敏感任务。
eevdf_scheduler.c_example:
if (entity_eligible(cfs_rq, se) && se->deadline < best->deadline)
    best = se;
eevdf_scheduler.rust_example: if se.eligible(cfs_rq) && se.deadline < best.deadline { best = se; }

o1_bitmap_scheduler.definition_zh: 每个优先级一条就绪队列，用位图记录非空优先级，取最高位即 O(1) 选出下一个任务；Linux 2.6 早期调度器。
o1_bitmap_scheduler.definition_en: One run-queue per priority plus a bitmap of non-empty priorities; the highest set bit gives the next task in O(1). The early 2.6 scheduler.
confusions: O(1) 用位图+优先级数组定复杂度；CFS 用红黑树按公平选。
o1_bitmap_scheduler.rust_example:
let idx = self.bitmap.trailing_zeros() as usize;
let task = self.queues[idx].pop_front();

load_balancing.definition_zh: 在多个 CPU 的就绪队列间迁移任务以均衡负载，按调度域/组周期性或空闲时触发 pull/push 迁移。
load_balancing.definition_en: Migrates tasks across per-CPU run-queues to balance load, triggered periodically or on idle via scheduling domains/groups.
confusions: 负载均衡是跨 CPU 迁移；CPU 亲和性是限制可运行 CPU 集合。
load_balancing.rust_example: if busiest.nr_running > this_rq.nr_running + imbalance { migrate(busiest, this_rq); }

cpu_affinity.definition_zh: 用 CPU 掩码限制任务只能在指定 CPU 集合上运行，用于隔离、缓存局部性或实时性。
cpu_affinity.definition_en: A CPU mask restricting which CPUs a task may run on, for isolation, cache locality, or real-time guarantees.
exclude: 跨 CPU 的负载均衡迁移策略
confusions: 亲和性约束可运行 CPU；负载均衡决定实际迁移。

transparent_huge_page.definition_zh: 内核自动用 2MB/1GB 大页后备匿名内存并按需拆分/合并，减少 TLB miss 与页表层级，对应用透明。
transparent_huge_page.definition_en: The kernel transparently backs anonymous memory with 2MB/1GB huge pages (splitting/collapsing as needed) to cut TLB misses and page-table depth.
exclude: 显式 hugetlbfs 预留大页
confusions: THP 自动透明；hugetlbfs 需应用显式申请预留。

numa_aware_alloc.definition_zh: 在 NUMA 系统上按节点就近分配物理内存(本地优先)，支持内存策略与跨节点回退，降低远端访问延迟。
numa_aware_alloc.definition_en: On NUMA systems, allocates physical memory from the local node first (with policies and fallback) to reduce remote-access latency.
confusions: NUMA 分配按节点就近；普通 buddy 不区分节点距离。

reverse_mapping_rmap.definition_zh: 从物理页反查所有映射它的页表项/VMA，使回收、迁移、写保护能高效取消或更新全部映射。
reverse_mapping_rmap.definition_en: Maps a physical page back to every PTE/VMA mapping it, so reclaim, migration, and write-protect can unmap or update all mappings efficiently.
exclude: 仅正向 VA->PA 的页表遍历
confusions: rmap 是物理页->映射者的反向链；页表是虚拟->物理的正向。

page_reclaim_kswapd.definition_zh: 内存紧张时由 kswapd 内核线程(或直接回收)按 LRU 扫描并换出/丢弃页，恢复到水位线以上。
page_reclaim_kswapd.definition_en: Under memory pressure, kswapd (or direct reclaim) scans LRU lists and evicts/writes back pages to restore free watermarks.
exclude: OOM 杀进程(回收失败后的最后手段)
confusions: kswapd 先回收页；回收仍不够才触发 OOM killer。

oom_killer.definition_zh: 当回收无法满足内存需求时，按 oom_score 选择并杀死占用大、价值低的进程释放内存，避免系统死锁。
oom_killer.definition_en: When reclaim cannot satisfy demand, selects and kills a high-footprint low-value process by oom_score to free memory and avoid deadlock.
confusions: OOM killer 是回收失败后的最后手段；kswapd 是常规回收。

memcg.definition_zh: 通过 cgroup 对一组进程的内存用量计费、限额，并在超限时触发组内回收/OOM，实现内存资源隔离。
memcg.definition_en: Accounts and limits memory usage per cgroup, triggering group-local reclaim/OOM on overage to isolate memory resources.
confusions: memcg 是 cgroup 的内存控制器；与 CPU/blkio 控制器并列。

seqlock.definition_zh: 读者无锁读取并用序号检测是否与写者冲突(奇数表示写进行中)，冲突则重试；适合读多写少且写者优先。
seqlock.definition_en: Readers run lock-free and use a sequence counter (odd = write in progress) to detect writer conflicts and retry; favors writers in read-mostly data.
confusions: seqlock 读者可能重试且不阻塞写者；rwlock 读者会阻塞写者。
seqlock.c_example: do { seq = read_seqbegin(&lock); v = data; } while (read_seqretry(&lock, seq));
seqlock.rust_example: loop { let seq = lock.read_begin(); let v = data; if !lock.read_retry(seq) { break v } }

mcs_qspinlock.definition_zh: 每个等待者在自己的本地节点上自旋并排成队列，依次交接锁，避免全局缓存行争抢，多核更稳定。
mcs_qspinlock.definition_en: Each waiter spins on its own local node and queues for the lock in order, avoiding global cache-line contention and scaling on many cores.
exclude: 简单 test-and-set 全局自旋
confusions: MCS/qspinlock 每核本地自旋；ticket/TAS 自旋锁争抢同一缓存行。
mcs_qspinlock.c_example:
node->next = NULL; prev = xchg(&lock->tail, node);
if (prev) { prev->next = node; while (!node->locked) cpu_relax(); }
mcs_qspinlock.rust_example:
let prev = lock.tail.swap(node, AcqRel);
if let Some(p) = prev { p.next.store(node); while !node.locked.load(Acquire) {} }

percpu_counter.definition_zh: 把全局计数拆成每 CPU 本地子计数，更新只写本地、读时汇总，降低跨核原子争用。
percpu_counter.definition_en: Splits a global count into per-CPU local subcounts; updates touch only the local one and reads sum them, cutting cross-core atomic contention.
confusions: per-CPU counter 用空间换并发；单个 atomic 多核争用严重。

lockdep_deadlock_detect.definition_zh: 运行时记录锁的获取顺序并构建依赖图，检测循环依赖、错误嵌套等潜在死锁，是调试期正确性工具。
lockdep_deadlock_detect.definition_en: A runtime validator that records lock acquisition order, builds a dependency graph, and flags cyclic/invalid nesting as potential deadlocks.
exclude: 生产路径的实际加锁逻辑本身
confusions: lockdep 是调试期检测，不改变锁语义；与锁实现分离。
